checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

checks.name: auth
findings: Bot detection systems: Akamai
No CAPTCHA detected on main page or login
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
Login form at /login — simple, 3 inputs

checks.name: docs
findings: robots.txt is present and doesn't specifically block AI bots
robots.txt references a sitemap
sitemap.xml found with ~5830 URLs
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found
No JSON-LD structured data found
llms.txt found at /.well-known/llms.txt (229686 chars)

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 409 divs with only 6 semantic elements
Good accessibility: 128/136 interactive elements have labels
Forms need work: 1/3 inputs have names, 3/3 have types
Found 1 elements with stable test selectors
Likely a client-side SPA — minimal server-rendered content
Good heading hierarchy: 15 headings, well-structured
1 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
Good link accessibility: 120/121 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Unexpected status 501 for DELETE on main page

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~77,144 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 2% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 27 — deeply nested structure
CSS class attributes consume ~11,273 tokens (15% of page)
Reading this page costs $0.10–$1.16 per load ($0.48–$5.79 for a 5-page session)

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation, region
All 2 images have alt attributes (1 descriptive, 1 decorative)
Found 1 skip link(s) — helps agents jump to main content
No ARIA live regions — dynamic content changes may be invisible to agents
6 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0
4 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 310ms
Moderate payload: 301KB
1 redirect(s) — acceptable
Resource heavy: 12 scripts
Compression enabled: gzip
